description: The 'auth-system' namespace has three deployments (public-api, k8s-sync-worker, vault-auth-proxy) violating zero-trust policies. Secure these deployments by disabling default token mounts and configuring bound ServiceAccount token volume projections as required by the specification at /home/ga/Desktop/identity_security_spec.yaml. Access the 'local' cluster via Rancher at https://localhost using credentials admin / Admin12345678!.
